title: Flexibility
description:
Refers to the system's ability to be adapted or transferred to different environments. A flexible system easily adjusts to new contexts.
[ul]
[b]Adaptability[/b]: adjusts to different environments.
[b]Scalability[/b]: handles load variation.
[b]Installability[/b]: easy to install/remove.
[b]Replaceability[/b]: can replace other systems.[/ul]
